summary: Completed comprehensive testing of redesigned internal cabinet pages for Developer and Client roles - all features working correctly with consistent design
passed_tests: Client authentication page (/client/auth) - dark theme, blue accents, demo functionality
Developer authentication page (/builder/auth) - consistent design with client auth
Client Dashboard (/client/dashboard) - stats cards, navigation, proper styling
Client New Request (/client/request/new) - gradient heading, form functionality, example ideas
Client Projects (/client/projects) - list view, progress bars, search, tab filters
Client Support (/client/support) - ticket list, new ticket modal, status tabs
Developer Dashboard (/developer/dashboard) - stats, next task, recent activity, quick actions
Developer Work Board (/developer/board) - Kanban columns, drag-drop functionality, search
Developer Performance (/developer/performance) - profile card, stats, progress bar
Developer Assignments (/developer/assignments) - list with tabs, empty states
All pages have consistent dark theme (#05050A background, blue-600 accents)
All pages have rounded-2xl corners, proper shadows, gradient backgrounds
Demo authentication working for both client and developer roles
Navigation between pages working correctly
Form inputs and buttons functioning properly
Empty states displaying appropriate messages
Session management working (redirects to auth when expired)
Backend API endpoints all responding correctly
Platform stats, portfolio cases, and featured cases APIs working
User registration and login APIs functioning
Demo access APIs creating temporary users correctly
